name: Basic Outshift SRE triage
prompt: Run basic Outshift SRE triage across GitHub, ArgoCD, AWS, PagerDuty, and Splunk

name: ArgoCD deployment debugging
prompt: Check ArgoCD deployment status for GRID prod 0.5.x and identify unhealthy or out-of-sync applications

name: GitHub release readiness
prompt: Check GitHub pull requests and workflow checks related to the GRID prod 0.5.x deployment

name: AWS infrastructure health
prompt: Check AWS and EKS health signals for the GRID prod 0.5.x deployment

name: PagerDuty incident check
prompt: Check PagerDuty for active incidents or on-call issues during GRID prod 0.5.x deployment testing

name: Splunk log check
prompt: Search Splunk for recent errors related to GRID prod 0.5.x deployment testing

name: Webex team-space update
prompt: Post a GRID prod 0.5.x deployment testing summary to the team Webex space
